sections.heading: What is a Butter Calculator?
sections.content: The Butter Calculator lets you convert butter quantities between sticks, cups, tablespoons, grams, ounces, and milliliters instantly. Ideal for bakers, chefs, and home cooks who need precise measurements.

sections.heading: How to Use the Calculator
sections.content: Follow these steps to convert butter units accurately:

subSections.heading: Steps
subSections.content:
1. Enter Amount – Input butter quantity in any unit.
2. Select Unit – Choose the unit for your input.
3. Choose Target Unit – Select the unit(s) you want to convert to.
4. Click Convert – Get the equivalent butter amount instantly.
5. Tip – For precise baking, use weight-based units like grams or ounces.

sections.heading: Key Features
sections.content: This butter converter is designed for accurate and fast conversions:

subSections.heading: Features
subSections.content:
- Instant Conversion – Converts between all major butter units.
- Supports Multiple Units – Sticks, cups, grams, ounces, tablespoons, milliliters.
- Accurate & Reliable – Uses standard conversion ratios.
- International-Friendly – Seamlessly converts US and metric units.
- Mobile-Optimized – Works smoothly on all devices.

sections.heading: Use Cases
sections.content: People rely on this tool for many kitchen and recipe-related tasks:

subSections.heading: Examples
subSections.content:
- Baking & Cooking: Follow recipes with exact measurements.
- International Recipes: Convert US butter units to metric and vice versa.
- Diet & Nutrition: Measure butter precisely for calories or macros.
- Scaling Recipes: Adjust recipe size up or down easily.
- Learning: Understand butter measurement differences and conversions.

sections.heading: Example Conversions
sections.content: Here are common butter conversions to help you understand results:

subSections.heading: Examples
subSections.content:
- 2 sticks → 227 grams
- 1 cup → 16 tablespoons
- 8 ounces → 237 ml
- 113 grams → 1 stick

sections.heading: Tips & Best Practices
sections.content: Helpful tips for more accurate butter measurements:

subSections.heading: Tips
subSections.content:
- Prefer weight units (grams/ounces) for baking accuracy.
- Check if your recipe uses US or metric measurements.
- When melting butter, volume may slightly differ—use grams for precision.
- Always level off tablespoons and cups for correct results.
- For large recipes, convert all butter units into grams for consistency.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
sections.content: This butter conversion tool provides standard, widely accepted conversion estimates. Actual butter density may vary slightly depending on temperature and brand. Use weight measurements for the highest accuracy.
